_README: Fixed 9-axis → 8-trait projection. Each 8-trait UI label is computed as a weighted blend of one or more 9-axes. Weights per trait must sum to 1.0 (within EPSILON tolerance). The projection is intentionally lossy — the 9-axis system is the canonical scoring layer; the 8-trait UI is a presentation projection.

_schema.trait: 8-trait UI label (one of: AdvantageCreation, DecisionMaking, PassingCreation, ShootingGravity, OffBallValue, ProcessingSpeed, Scalability, DefensiveVersatility)
_schema.blend: Object mapping axis key (one of the 9 axes from axisScores.AXIS_KEYS) to weight (0..1). Sum of weights must equal 1.0.

_design_note: DecisionMaking and PassingCreation both project from `extend`. They produce the same numeric value today; differentiation can be added later (e.g., a downstream prose-tag override) without changing the projection topology.
